meaning: n.放射性碳,碳的放射性同位元素
examples: The most frequently used method is radiocarbon dating.
Tom, in your archaeology class, did you talk about radiocarbon dating?
It turns out that radiocarbon dating works for a lot of prehistoric art.
The Manis site was re-dated, which an accurate radiocarbon dating of 13, 800 years ago.
Radiocarbon dating can also be difficult if the bones are very small or fragmentary.
